tuning: E A D G B E
content:
“The Way You Love Me” – Faith Hill
Chords by Joan’s Genius 


Verse 1:
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
If I could grant you one wish[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
I'd wish you could see the way you kiss[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Ooh, I love watching you baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
When you're driving me crazy[/tab]


Chorus:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
Ooh, I love the way you, love the way you love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]
There's nowhere else I'd rather be[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Ooh, to feel the way I feel with your arms around me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I only wish that you could see[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
The way you love me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] 
The way you love me[/tab]


Verse 2:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
It's not right, it's not fair[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
What you're missing over there[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Someday I'll find a way to show you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
Just how lucky I am to know you[/tab]


(Repeat Chorus)


Bridge:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
You're the million reasons why[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch] 
There's love reflecting in my eyes[/tab]


(Repeat Chorus)


Outro:
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Ooh, the way you love me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
The way you love me[/tab]
